feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: IDOC LOIWCS AND QCERT AUTOMATION
entry.content:
Hello Specialists.

I have a problem with sending Outbound IDOCs, with the message type LOIWCS and QCERT. In the case of LOIWCS, I created a REPORT where I check the modification date, fill in a table, and submit it to the RCCLWCEN program. Is this a possibility?

Because I couldn't find a BADI to help me. For the QCERT case, I need to send an Inspection Plan, but what path do I need to follow to execute the sending of this type?

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh - Creating and triggering non-RAP custom events from S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to create and trigger non-RAP custom enterprise events from S/4HANA Private Cloud preferably through ABAP? If so, how can it be achieved and can we generate an event metadata/AsyncAPI file for such custom events for use in Event Consumption Model on BTP ABAP environment?

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: BSP click on line in the loop get show a figure.jpg
entry.content:
Hello!

Could you help me?
I have an ABAP BSP with a loop of an internal table.
I need to have the option with a 'click' to choose a row or cell that allows to display a figure that is in a link.                                   Thank you!

Exemple:

entry.title: why changes made to IDOC_DATA in exit_sapliedp_001 is not retained?
entry.content:
In  the IDOC type REMADV inside the customer exit- exit_sapliedp_001, I am making some changes to the value of a segment but when the IDOC is posted those values are not retained in the IDOC_DATA[ ] which is provided as a tables parameter. Can anyone help.

 

Thanks,

Prasenjit

entry.title: Activate DDL source EDOD_DC_USAGE The column SERVICE is unknown DDL source EDOD_DC_USAGE cou
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

I was implementing a note and this DLL error message appeared in the system.

How can I fix it?

Below are the evidence of the error.

 

Activate DDL source EDOD_DC_USAGE
   The column SERVICE is unknown

 

   DDL source EDOD_DC_USAGE could not be activated

 

   Synchronous processing: 0 sec., 1 objects, 1 costs

 

   *************************************************************************
         Object Activation
   End phase  002 ***********************************************************

 

   Start phase 003 **********************************************************
         Buffer Synchronization for Dependent Ref.to DTEL/T
   *************************************************************************

 

   *************************************************************************
         Buffer Synchronization for Dependent Ref.to DTEL/T
   End phase  003 ***********************************************************

 

   Start phase 004 **********************************************************
         Set ROOT/COMPOSITION rootnode relations for mass a
   *************************************************************************

 

   *************************************************************************
         Set ROOT/COMPOSITION rootnode relations for mass a
   End phase  004 ***********************************************************

 

   Start phase 005 **********************************************************
         Final log
   *************************************************************************

 

   The following errors or warnings have occurred:

 

   DDL Source EDOD_DC_USAGE could not be activated
   (E- The column service is unknown )
   (Package: GLO-EDO, SW-Comp: S4CORE, Appl-Comp: CA-GTF-CSC)

entry.title: Webservice call error from S4HANA/ECC to BTP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our requirement is to send data from ECC/S4HANA to SAP Integration Suite(CPI) where we generated URL after creating SOAP sender channel on CPI.

On SAP backend they are trying to generate Webservices in SOAMANAGER and when I try to ping the webservice after configuring CPI URL. Later, when I "Ping Webservice" from then it throws the following error(shown in screenshots).

Should we generate SSL certificates on CPI iflow level and then share with S4HANA/ECC Basis guys? Also should we ask Certificates from SAP backend to import it to CPI iflow level? 

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Why do we need read entity in RAP ?
entry.content:
I am learning RAP, so I have a doubt that why do we need Read Entitiy in RAP . I understood that to read the data from BO. but we already had select stmt/modify/insert stmt for that. I could have written select from cds entity to get my data in an internal table(just assuming).

requesting your help on this. this could be silly question but as i am new it feels a lot to me. tnx in advance

entry.title: ABAP CDS VIEW TO FETCH SUM OF QTY FROM MSEG TABLE FOR ALL ITEMS WITH RESPECT TO GIVEN INPUT
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a requirement to fetch the summation of Quantity from mseg table, menge is the field for quantity , shkzg is the field considered for Credit / Debit i.e., if it is "H" then we consider that item as Credit and if it is "S" then it is Debit. Please find the below 

 

define view ZTEST_MSEG_VIEWNAME as select from mseg 
 
{
key matnr as Matnr,
werks as Werks,
lgort   as Lgort,
menge as Quantity,
shkzg as CreditDebitInd,
count(*)   as totalCount,
case 
when shkzg = 'H' then (menge * 1)
when shkzg = 'S' then (menge * -1)
end as creditDebitQuantity
} 
where matnr = 'XXXXXXXXI.' and werks = 'XX4' and lgort = 'XXEN'  
group by matnr,werks,lgort,menge,shkzg

We created one more cds view to take the summation of the creditDebitQuantity as show below 

define view ZINV_MSEG_SUM_VIEWNAME as select from ZTEST_MSEG_VIEWNAME 

{ 
key  Matnr as Matnr,
key  Werks as Plant,
key  Lgort as Location,
 CreditDebitInd as CreditDebit,
sum(creditDebitQuantity ) as TOTAL_QTY
 
} 
where Matnr = 'XXXXXXXX.' and Werks = 'XX4' and Lgort = 'XXEN'

group by Matnr,Werks,Lgort,CreditDebitInd

on Executing the above we are getting summation of quantity as show below 

which shows that total Credit Quantity is 349 and Total Debit Quantity is 71 but this is not in sync with the summation count displayed at the MSEG Table in S/4 HANA SYSTEM. please find the below 

The sum of menge for items having value as "H" in column shkzg is 1065 and the sum of menge for items having value as "S" in column shkzg is 1075.  for given material, plant and lgort. 

please do the need full, as the ABAP CDS View should also display the same output as 1065 & 1075 , but instead it is displaying 71 & 349 respectively  

Thank you

entry.title: How to get 'Report Name' by using the GP program in Report Painter?
entry.content:
I've GP Program names of the report painter. i want to find the 'REPORT NAME', by using the GP Program name (GP program starts with GP*......)

one step i know:-
1)Goto 'SE38'--> put the program name --> in the header part there will be a comment section , in the comments REPORT GROUP is written.
2)Take that report group--> goto table 'T803J' and put report group --> you will get 'LIBRARY'.
3)Take library --> goto table 'T800' and put library --> you will get 'REPORT NAME'.

i followed above step, but for this it requires "REPORT GROUP" which i dont have.

please you know how to get 'REPORT NAME' kindly share it.

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: LSMW issue for transaction CG02BD
entry.content: While using LSMW to remove reference number and material from the substance for transaction CG02BD, I am getting screen field errors that particular screen fields are not available. Please let me know if there are any inputs.

entry.title: How to get the cancellation date for an invoice in VBRK?
entry.content:
Hi all,

How can I get the cancellation date when an invoice in VBRK is cancelled (FKSTO='X')?

TIA,

Luis Rodriguez

entry.title: How can I configure the Z field added to the BUT000 table via web ui in the CRM system to the BP.
entry.content: How can I configure the Z field added to the BUT000 table via web ui in the CRM system to the BP screen?

entry.title: SAP GTS Version retrieve
entry.content:
Hi,

Good Day.

We are using the latest version of SAP GTS with the EHP8 upgrade, but by mistake, some transports from the development environment, which were created before the EHP8 version, were imported into the quality environment. As a result, these transports have overwritten the EHP8 version when checking the version management of certain objects. Is there a way to restore the EHP8 version as the active version again?

entry.title: LO_BCS Creates folder in client's outlook for PDF print.
entry.content:
I am using LO_BCS to send an attachment of Smartform output print which is nothing but a PDF file, however this attachment creates extra folder in Outlook, which requires one extra click to open PDF file.

Is there any solution to send an attachment without this extra folder?       

 

 

Actual PDF after clicking the folder.

 

      CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERT_OTF'
       EXPORTING
         FORMAT                      = 'PDF'
       IMPORTING
         BIN_FILESIZE                = W_BINFILESIZE
         bin_file                    = lv_bin_xstr
        TABLES
          OTF                        =  IT_OTF_DATA
          LINES                      =  IT_PDF_DATA
                .
      IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
      ELSE.
       CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
         EXPORTING
           buffer     = lv_bin_xstr
         TABLES
           binary_tab = lt_binary_content.
        TRY.
            lo_bcs = cl_bcs=>create_persistent( ).
*      ---------------------------------------------------------------------
*      -----------------&      Create Document     *------------------------
*      ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        DATA: LV_SUBJECT TYPE SO_OBJ_DES.

        LV_SUBJECT = LS_COMPOSER_PARAM-TDTITLE.
        lo_doc_bcs = cl_document_bcs=>create_document(
                        i_type    = 'RAW'
                        i_text    = lt_text[]
                        i_length  = '12'
                        i_subject = LV_SUBJECT ).   "Subject of the Email
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
*-----------------&   Add attachment to document     *----------------
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
        CALL METHOD lo_doc_bcs->add_attachment
          EXPORTING
            i_attachment_type    = 'PDF'
            i_attachment_size    = lv_bin_filesize
            i_attachment_subject = LV_SUBJECT
            i_att_content_hex    = lt_binary_content.

        CALL METHOD lo_bcs->set_document( lo_doc_bcs ).
        data: lv_string type ADR6-SMTP_ADDR.
        IF NAST-KSCHL = 'ZRDE'.
          lv_string = wa_TVARVC2-LOW.
                sender    = cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address(
                                                      lv_string ).
                lo_bcs->set_sender( sender ).
        ELSE.
          READ TABLE IT_TVARVC2 WITH KEY LOW = LS_BIL_INVOICE-HD_GEN-SOLD_TO_PARTY.
          IF SY-SUBRC IS NOT INITIAL AND ( T_VKORG NE '1000' AND T_VKORG NE '5000' ).
            lv_string = S_SENDER_EMAIL.
                  sender    = cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address(
                                                        lv_string ).
                  lo_bcs->set_sender( sender ).
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.
       LOOP AT lt_adr6 into ls_adr6.
         lo_recep = cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address(
                                                        ls_adr6-smtp_addr ).
         if sy-tabix = 1.
          CALL METHOD lo_bcs->add_recipient
            EXPORTING
              i_recipient = lo_recep
              i_express   = 'X'.
         else.
            CALL METHOD lo_bcs->add_recipient
              EXPORTING
                i_recipient = lo_recep
                i_copy      = 'X'.

         endif.
       ENDLOOP.

        CALL METHOD lo_bcs->set_send_immediately
              EXPORTING
                i_send_immediately = ''.
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
*-----------------&   Send the email    *-----------------------------
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
    CALL METHOD lo_bcs->send(
      EXPORTING
        i_with_error_screen = 'X'
      RECEIVING
        result              = lv_sent_to_all ).

entry.title: BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_SLS giving random result
entry.content:
Dear community,

we are using BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_SLS in our custom FM to create deliveries. Custom FM is calling by RFC call. We have two scenarios when the standard FM generates different results:

1. When we send package from external system with Sales Order number and only 1 line item (in Sales Order in SAP we have 5 line items) there is created delivery for all 5 items. Then when we delete this delivery and send the package with 1 line item again for the same Sales Order there is created delivery with only 1 line item as expected. Same result when we set a break-point and checking in debug mode the variables - everything is fine.

2. Similar situation with order consolidation: we send package from external system with 2 Sales Orders: for the first time system creates only 1 delivery for 1 of the orders, when we delete  delivery and send same package again - it creates one consolidated delivery for both orders. And again with external break-point everything is working as expected from the first attempt.

We placed wait parameter for 1 second before FM but no success. Also we checked some old enhancements in standard FM for some logic, but did not find any impact. Checked external system, the packages of the data sent to SAP with RFC are always the same.

If somebody faced with such issue in the past, could you please share your experience and thoughts.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to get the cancellation date for an invoice in VBRK?
entry.content:
I couldn’t find how to delete my own posts, but here’s what I’ve discovered:

The table VBRK has a column called SFAKN, which contains the number of the original canceled document. Additionally, in our specific implementation of SAP, the column VBRK-VBTYP holds the value ‘N’ for cancellation documents. Therefore, I used the following SQL statement:

 

 

  SELECT SINGLE fkdat FROM vbrk
    WHERE sfakn = @p_vbeln
      AND vbtyp = 'N'
    INTO _date.

 

 

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Communication error when sending with HTTP, Idoc to HTTP destination
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to send idoc to HTTP destination using background job. Idoc gets created but sending fails.

Communication error when sending with HTTP

The error code and the error message are: 411 /Connect to XXXXXX:443 failed: NIECONN_REFUSED(-10).

Same works fine when done manually, but not in job. Connection test is ok in SM59.

Cannot find anythig helpfull with error code 411...

Any ideas what might be the problem when sending in background?

Regards,

Pekka

entry.title: Screen Enhancement for IW48 Transaction.

Hi Team,

Greetings of the day!

Need to do screen enhancement for adding a custom field in input and output of IW48 transaction.

Please let me know the procedure for the same.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav.

entry.title: Unable to fetch KBETR field in price condition using formula routine
entry.content:
We have (zppt price per )tonne which is header condition type also we have ZB00 is base price item condition, we will enter manually zppt price at header and we have to calculate base price condition amount in KBETR ,we have created 918 condition value formula routine , we unable fetch zb00 condition rate in KBETR field, we are getting calculated XKWERT field i.e condition value, unable fetch KBETR, please suggest solution.

data : lt_pack TYPE TABLE OF zpack, wa_pack TYPE zpack.

data : lt_marm TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF marm, wa_marm type marm.

data : lt_marm1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF marm, wa_marm1 type marm.

data : lt_prcd TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF prcd_elements, wa_prcd type prcd_elements.

*DATA : ZB001 TYPE p DECIMALS 3.

DATA : ZB001 TYPE decfloat34.

DATA : ZB002 TYPE KWERT.

DATA : ZB003 TYPE KWERT.

data : lv_conversion TYPE f.

SELECT * FROM zpack INTO TABLE lt_pack WHERE matnr = komp-matnr and WERKS = komp-werks and meins = komp-meins.

SORT lt_pack DESCENDING by edate. SELECT * FROM marm INTO TABLE lt_marm where matnr = komp-matnr and meinh = 'TO'.

SELECT * from prcd_elements into table lt_prcd where knumv = komk-knumv and kschl = 'ZPPT'.

READ TABLE lt_marm into wa_marm INDEX 1. READ TABLE lt_pack into wa_pack INDEX 1. READ TABLE lt_prcd into wa_prcd with key kschl = 'ZPPT' kposn = komp-kposn.

ZB001 = ( wa_marm-umren / wa_marm-umrez ) .

IF KOMV-KSCHL = 'ZPPT'.

ZB002 = ZB001 * KOMV-KBETR .

ZB003 = ZB002 + wa_pack-rate.

xkwert = ZB003 * KOMP-MGAME / 1000 . ELSEIF

KOMV-KSCHL = 'ZB00'.

ZB002 = KOMV-kbetr.

xkwert = ZB002 * KOMP-MGAME / 1000 . ENDIF.

*ZB003 = ZB002 + wa_pack-rate.

xkwert = ZB003 KOMP-MGAME / 1000     above code is written in condition value formula routine
